reviews.review_title: This game is so good for hanging out
reviews.review_description: This game I swear is one day gonna be better than gtag this game is fun and calm I think they should add a horror mode and I can’t wait for the parkour this game is just amazing. Moderator you’re doing a great job I’ll be playing this every day.

reviews.review_title: This game is the best I am a moderator
reviews.review_description: This game is probably one of the best fan games out there for hanging out and finding stuff, I hope this helps you
Very high quality and i love it! Can i try to become a moderator? I could do lots for the community and I have my own game on AppLab to! 🩷

Hey there! 
I'm the Creator of Monkey Havoc! I hope you have a great time in this game, and play around with your friends in the multiple worlds I have created!

This is a very fun game! ZeroG is awasome too
